summary: Departed following increasing constraints around engineering sustainability and progression
achievements: Recognized architectural issues with three legacy templating systems and initiated the transition toward a component-based frontend system used to standardize UI development.
Delivered performance improvements and stability enhancements
Advocated for structured technical debt reduction to prevent long-term system degradation
responsibilities: Primary engineer responsible for diagnosing and resolving production issues across the platform.
Specialized in debugging complex legacy systems and improving reliability.
Maintained operational stability by rapidly identifying root causes and shipping fixes.
